title: Method for one-pot production of a primary amine from an alcohol
abstract: A method for producing a compound of formula (III) or a salt thereof, wherein said process comprises the following steps: (a) forming a mixture comprising a compound of formula (II) by adding an organocatalyst to a compound of formula (I) in an aqueous medium comprising an oxidizing agent and an organic co-solvent; and adding an aqueous buffer, a transamination catalyst, an amine donor compound and a cofactor to the mixture obtained in step (a), wherein said transamination catalyst is added at the same time as or after adding said aqueous buffer.
